items.title: As a support agent, I want to receive routed emails in my queue so that I only see emails relevant to my team
items.description: Routing must filter emails to the correct team inbox based on the classification label assigned by the NLP engine.

items.title: As an IT administrator, I want to connect a mailbox via IMAP so that the system can ingest incoming emails
items.description: The admin UI must expose an IMAP/SMTP connection form with host, port, username, password, and TLS settings.

items.title: As an IT administrator, I want to create routing rules with priority ordering so that emails are always sent to the right team
items.description: Rule builder UI must support conditions (sender domain, keyword, label) with AND/OR logic and a drag-to-reorder priority list.

items.title: Email Ingestion
items.description: Connect to mailboxes and ingest emails in real time.

items.title: Routing Rules Engine
items.description: No-code rule builder for administrators to configure routing logic.

items.title: Implement IMAP connection module
items.description: Build the IMAP client that connects to external mailboxes, polls for new emails on a configurable interval, and emits events to the ingestion queue.

items.title: Build routing rules persistence layer
items.description: Design and implement the database schema and API for creating, updating, and deleting routing rules with priority ordering.
